positive: A whimsical, stylized depiction of a group of friendly woodland animals (fox, deer, owl, rabbit) gathered together, silhouetted against a vibrant, twilight forest background. The animals are rendered in a flat, graphic design style with thick, clean outlines and minimal internal details, emphasizing negative space. The composition is centrally focused, suitable for a chest print on apparel. Use a limited color palette of deep jewel tones (sapphire blue, emerald green, burnt orange) complemented by stark white highlights for contrast. Style should be reminiscent of modern Nordic illustration and sophisticated children's book art. Highly detailed, vector quality, perfect for screen printing. Minimalist, high contrast, clean lines, central composition.
negative: blurry, grainy, low-detail, photographic, realism, bokeh, noise, artifacts, watermark, signature, text, dirty, smudge, extra limbs, bad anatomy, cropped, poorly rendered, ugly
